mapper.select: SELECT tcs.id, tcs.COMPANY_ID, tcs.COMPANY_NAME, tcs.STATEMENT_NO, tcs.IS_ENTER, tcs.CUSTOMER_ID, tcs.CUSTOMER_NAME, tcs.type, tcs.TRUST_ID, tcs.TRUST_CARGO_ID, tcs.HANDOVERLIST_ID, tcs.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, tcs.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, tcs.CARGO_CODE, tcs.CARGO_NAME, tcs.TRADE_TYPE, tcs.SETTLEMENT_DATE, tcs.status, tcs.CREATE_BY_NAME, tcs.CREATE_TIME, tcs.IS_FINAL, tcs.STATEMENT_BY_NAME, tcs.STATEMENT_TIME, tcs.REVIEW_BY_NAME, tcs.REVIEW_TIME, tcs.CONFIRM_BY_NAME, tcs.CONFIRM_TIME, tcs.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, tcs.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, tcs.TAX_INVOICE_CODE, tcs.TAX_INVOICE_NAME, tcs.RECEIPT_REMARK, tcs.REJECT_BY_NAME, tcs.REJECT_TIME, tcs.REJECT_REASON, tcs.BONDED_AREA_TON, tcs.FINANCE_STATUS, decode(tcs.FINANCE_STATUS,'10','未审核','已审核') financeStatusLabel, tcs.FINANCE_BY_NAME, tcs.FINANCE_TIME, tcs.CARGO_INFO_ID, TCSD.AMOUNT, tcs.IS_RED_RUSH, TCS.RELATION_ID FROM T_COST_STATEMENT tcs left join ( select Sum(NVL(AMOUNT,0)) amount,STATEMENT from T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL group by STATEMENT ) tcsd on tcsd.STATEMENT=tcs.ID where tcs.id = #{id}
mapper.update:
update T_COST_STATEMENT set STATUS = #{status}, CONFIRM_BY = #{loginUserId}, CONFIRM_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, CONFIRM_TIME = #{now}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} where ID in
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

update T_COST_STATEMENT set
IS_PRINT = '1',
IS_PRINT = null,
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} where ID in
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

update T_COST_STATEMENT set STATUS = #{status}, CONFIRM_BY = null, CONFIRM_BY_NAME = null, CONFIRM_TIME = null, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} where ID = #{id}

update T_COST_STATEMENT set FINANCE_STATUS = '20', UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}, FINANCE_BY = #{loginUserId}, FINANCE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, FINANCE_TIME = #{now} where ID in
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

update T_COST_STATEMENT set FINANCE_STATUS = '10', FINANCE_BY = null, FINANCE_BY_NAME = null, FINANCE_TIME = null, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}, MARKET_BY = #{loginUserId}, MARKET_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, MARKET_TIME = #{now} where ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT TBR.id, TBR.RATE_ITEM_CODE, TBR.RATE_ITEM_NAME, TBR.PROCESS_CODE, TBR.PROCESS_NAME, TBR.RATE, TBR.TAX_RATE, TBR.RATE_ITEM_NAME || '/' || TBR.RATE rateName FROM T_BUS_RATE tbr where tbr.status = '10'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_COST_STATEMENT( ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, STATEMENT_NO, IS_ENTER, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, TYPE, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_ID, HANDOVERLIST_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, SETTLEMENT_DATE, STATUS, RECEIPT_REMARK, TAX_INVOICE_CODE, TAX_INVOICE_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, IS_FINAL, INVOICE_DATE, CONTRACT_NO, SHIP_NAME_VOYAGE, CARGO_INFO_ID, IS_RED_RUSH, RELATION_ID) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statementNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isEnter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trustId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{trustCargoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{handoverlistId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageId}, #{shipvoyageItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{settlementDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receiptRemark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxInvoiceCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxInvoiceName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{isFinal, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceDate}, #{contractNo}, #{shipNameVoyage}, #{cargoInfoId}, #{isRedRush}, #{relationId})

INSERT INTO T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL( ID, STATEMENT, CONTRACT_ID, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, RATE, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, "NUMBER", AMOUNT, TAX, TAX_AMOUNT, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, NUMBER2) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{statement,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contractId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{rateItemCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rateItemName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serviceContentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{serviceContentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{unitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{number,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{tax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{taxAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{number2,jdbcType=DECIMAL})
mapper.select: SELECT tcs.id, tcs.COMPANY_ID, tcs.COMPANY_NAME, tcs.STATEMENT_NO, tcs.IS_ENTER, tcs.CUSTOMER_ID, tcs.CUSTOMER_NAME, tcs.TYPE, tcs.TRUST_ID, tcs.TRUST_CARGO_ID, tcs.HANDOVERLIST_ID, tcs.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, tcs.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, tcs.CARGO_CODE, tcs.CARGO_NAME, tcs.TRADE_TYPE, tcs.SETTLEMENT_DATE, tcs.status, tcs.CREATE_BY_NAME, tcs.CREATE_TIME, tcs.IS_FINAL, tcs.STATEMENT_BY_NAME, tcs.STATEMENT_TIME, tcs.REVIEW_BY_NAME, tcs.REVIEW_TIME, tcs.CONFIRM_BY_NAME, tcs.CONFIRM_TIME, tcs.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, tcs.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, tcs.TAX_INVOICE_CODE, tcs.TAX_INVOICE_NAME, tcs.RECEIPT_REMARK, tcs.REJECT_BY_NAME, tcs.REJECT_TIME, tcs.REJECT_REASON, tcs.BONDED_AREA_TON, tcs.FINANCE_STATUS, decode( tcs.FINANCE_STATUS, '10', '未审核', '已审核' ) financeStatusLabel, tcs.FINANCE_BY_NAME, tcs.FINANCE_TIME, tcs.CONTRACT_NO, tcs.SHIP_NAME_VOYAGE, tcs.CARGO_INFO_ID, tds.SHIP_NAME SHIP_NAME, tdsi.VOYAGE, tds.TRADE_TYPE, to_char( tds.LEAVE_BERTH_TIME, 'yyyy-MM-dd' ) LEAVE_BERTH_TIME, to_char( tds.BERTH_TIME, 'yyyy-MM-dd' ) BERTH_TIME_STR, tbci.CARGO_INFO_NO, tcs.INVOICE_DATE FROM T_COST_STATEMENT tcs LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM tdsi ON tdsi.ID = tcs.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE tds ON tds.ID = tdsi.SHIPVOYAGE_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO tbci ON tcs.CARGO_INFO_ID = tbci.ID where tcs.id = #{id}

SELECT to_char( max(tdtsr.end_time) ,'yyyy-MM-dd') LEAVE_BERTH_TIME FROM "T_COST_STATEMENT" tcs LEFT JOIN T_COST_TUG_FEE tctf ON tctf.id = tcs.TUG_FEE_ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_TUG_SERVICE_RECORD tdtsr ON tdtsr.TUGBOAT_PLAN_ID = tctf.tug_service_id where tcs.id = #{id}

select t1.ID, t1.STATEMENT, t1.CONTRACT_ID, t1.CONTRACT_RATE_ID, t1.RATE_ITEM_CODE, t1.RATE_ITEM_NAME, t1.SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, t1.SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, t1.PROCESS_CODE, t1.PROCESS_NAME, t1.RATE, t1.UNIT_CODE, t1.UNIT_NAME, t1."NUMBER", t1.AMOUNT, NVL(t1.AMOUNTJF,t1.AMOUNT) AMOUNTJF, NVL(t1.AMOUNTZK,0) AMOUNTZK, t1.TAX, t1.TAX_AMOUNT, t1.REMARK, t1.NUMBER2， t1.UTILIZED_AMOUNT, t1.INVOICE_AMOUNT from T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL t1 where t1.STATEMENT = #{id}

select * from ( select t1.ID, t1.STATEMENT, t1.CONTRACT_ID, t1.CONTRACT_RATE_ID, t1.RATE_ITEM_CODE, to_char(t1.RATE_ITEM_NAME) RATE_ITEM_NAME, t1.SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, t1.SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, t1.PROCESS_CODE, t1.PROCESS_NAME, t1.RATE, t1.UNIT_CODE, t1.UNIT_NAME, t1."NUMBER", NVL(t1.AMOUNTJF,t1.AMOUNT) AMOUNT, NVL(t1.AMOUNTJF,t1.AMOUNT) AMOUNTJF, NVL(t1.AMOUNTZK,0) AMOUNTZK, t1.TAX, t1.TAX_AMOUNT, t1.REMARK, t1.NUMBER2， t1.UTILIZED_AMOUNT, t1.INVOICE_AMOUNT, t2.START_POSITION_NAME, t2.END_POSITION_NAME, t2.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME from T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL t1 left join T_COST_TXP_WORKLOAD_DETAIL t2 on t2.id=t1.BUSINESS_ID where t1.STATEMENT = #{id} union all select null ID, null STATEMENT, null CONTRACT_ID, null CONTRACT_RATE_ID, null RATE_ITEM_CODE, '折扣' RATE_ITEM_NAME, null SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, null SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, null PROCESS_CODE, null PROCESS_NAME, null RATE, null UNIT_CODE, null UNIT_NAME, null "NUMBER", -sum(NVL(t1.AMOUNTZK,0)) AMOUNT, null AMOUNTJF, null AMOUNTZK, null TAX, null TAX_AMOUNT, null REMARK, null NUMBER2， null UTILIZED_AMOUNT, null INVOICE_AMOUNT, null START_POSITION_NAME, null END_POSITION_NAME, null CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME from T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL t1 left join T_COST_TXP_WORKLOAD_DETAIL t2 on t2.id=t1.BUSINESS_ID where t1.STATEMENT = #{id} and NVL(t1.AMOUNTZK,0) !=0) where AMOUNT!=0 and AMOUNT is not null
mapper.update: update T_COST_STATEMENT set ID = #{id}, COMPANY_ID = #{companyId}, COMPANY_NAME = #{companyName}, CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}, CUSTOMER_NAME = #{customerName}, TYPE = #{type}, TRADE_TYPE = #{tradeType}, SETTLEMENT_DATE = #{settlementDate}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}, CONTRACT_NO = #{contractNo}, SHIP_NAME_VOYAGE = #{shipNameVoyage}, CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select A.ID "id", A.ITEM_CD "itemCd", A.ITEM_NM "itemNm", A.ITEM_TYPE_CD "itemTypeCd", A.RATE_TYPE_CD "rateTypeCd", A.RATE_TYPE_NM "rateTypeNm", B.DICT_LABEL "itemTypeNm" FROM m_fee_item A left join (SELECT MDD.* FROM M_DICT_DATA MDD JOIN M_DICT_TYPE MDT ON MDD.DICT_TYPE = MDT.DICT_TYPE AND MDD.STATUS = '1' AND MDT.STATUS = '1') B on B.DICT_VALUE=A.ITEM_TYPE_CD AND B.DICT_TYPE='FEE_ITEM_TYPE'

SELECT tcs.id, tcs.COMPANY_ID, tcs.COMPANY_NAME, tcs.STATEMENT_NO, tcs.IS_ENTER, tcs.CUSTOMER_ID, tcs.CUSTOMER_NAME, tcs.type, tcs.TRUST_ID, tcs.TRUST_CARGO_ID, tcs.HANDOVERLIST_ID, tcs.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, tcs.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, tcs.CARGO_CODE, tcs.CARGO_NAME, tcs.TRADE_TYPE, tcs.SETTLEMENT_DATE, tcs.status, tcs.CREATE_BY_NAME, tcs.CREATE_TIME, tcs.IS_FINAL, tcs.STATEMENT_BY_NAME, tcs.STATEMENT_TIME, tcs.REVIEW_BY_NAME, tcs.REVIEW_TIME, tcs.CONFIRM_BY_NAME, tcs.CONFIRM_TIME, tcs.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, tcs.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, tcs.TAX_INVOICE_CODE, tcs.TAX_INVOICE_NAME, tcs.RECEIPT_REMARK, tcs.REJECT_BY_NAME, tcs.REJECT_TIME, tcs.REJECT_REASON, tcs.BONDED_AREA_TON, tcs.FINANCE_STATUS, decode(tcs.FINANCE_STATUS,'10','未审核','已审核') financeStatusLabel, tcs.FINANCE_BY_NAME, tcs.FINANCE_TIME, tcsd.AMOUNT FROM T_COST_STATEMENT tcs left join ( select Sum(NVL(AMOUNT,0)) amount,STATEMENT from T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL group by STATEMENT ) tcsd on tcsd.STATEMENT=tcs.ID where tcs.id in
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update:
update T_COST_STATEMENT set STATUS = #{status}, RECHECK_BY = #{loginUserId}, RECHECK_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, RECHECK_TIME = #{now}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} where ID in
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

update T_COST_STATEMENT set STATUS = #{status}, RECHECK_BY = null, RECHECK_BY_NAME = null, RECHECK_TIME = null, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} where ID = #{id}

update T_COST_STATEMENT set STATUS = #{status}, APPLY_INVOICE_BY = #{loginUserId}, APPLY_INVOICE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, APPLY_INVOICE_TIME = #{now}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} where ID in
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

update T_COST_STATEMENT set STATUS = #{status}, APPLY_INVOICE_BY = null, APPLY_INVOICE_BY_NAME = null, APPLY_INVOICE_TIME = null, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} where ID = #{id}
mapper.select: select TPWE.ID "id", LISTAGG(SFB.FILE_ID, ',') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY SFB.FILE_ID ) "FILE_IDS" from T_PRD_WATER_ELECTRICITY TPWE LEFT JOIN SYS_FILE_BUSINESS SFB ON TPWE.ID = SFB.BUSINESS_ID where TPWE.TRUST_ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT} GROUP BY TPWE.ID
mapper.update: update T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL set AMOUNT = #{amount}, TAX_AMOUNT = #{taxAmount}, REMARK = #{remark}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} where ID = #{id}

update T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL set AMOUNT = #{amount}, AMOUNTJF = #{amountjf}, AMOUNTZK = #{amountzk}, remark = #{remark}, TAX_AMOUNT = #{taxAmount}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} where ID = #{id}

update T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST set SETTLEMENT_ID = null, SETTLEMENT_NAME = null, STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE = '10', STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME = '未结算', UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} where ID = #{handoverlistId}
update T_COST_STATEMENT set IS_RED_RUSH = '1', RELATION_ID = #{relationId}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} where ID = #{id}
update T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL set BUSINESS_ID = NULL, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} where STATEMENT = #{id}
update T_MISC_BILLING set STATEMENT_ID = NULL, STATUS = 20, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} WHERE STATEMENT_ID = #{id}
update T_COST_TUG_FEE set STATUS = '10', STATUS_LABEL = '未审核', UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} where ID = #{tugFeeId}
update T_COST_TXP_WORKLOAD set STATUS = '10', STATUS_LABEL = '未审核', UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} where ID = #{tugFeeId}

update T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE set STATUS = '10', REVIEW_BY = null, REVIEW_BY_NAME = null, REVIEW_BY_TIME = null, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} where ID = (select tug_fee_id from T_COST_STATEMENT where id = #{id})
